Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 8, 2026

Introduction

At Ilaaj AI, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our service.

Information We Collect

We may collect information that you provide to us, including:

  • Personal information (name, phone number, email)
  • Health-related information you choose to share
  • Device and usage information

How We Use Your Information

  • Provide and improve our services
  • Respond to your inquiries and requests
  • Ensure the security of our platform

Artificial Intelligence (AI) Usage

Our app uses third-party AI services to provide health responses. We may send user queries, interaction history, and non-identifiable technical metadata to the AI system. We never share your name, email, phone number, location, or any personally identifiable information with AI services.

Before any data is shared with third-party AI systems, we obtain explicit user consent during onboarding.

Data Retention

We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to provide our services. The following retention periods apply:

Account & Profile Data

Name, email, and phone number are retained while your account is active and permanently deleted within 30 days of an account deletion request.

Health-Related Data

Health information you provide is retained while your account is active and permanently deleted within 30 days of an account deletion request.

AI Interaction Data

Queries and interaction history sent to third-party AI services are not retained by us beyond 6 months, after which data is anonymized or deleted.

Device & Usage Data

Technical data such as device identifiers, app usage logs, and crash reports are retained for up to 12 months.

Analytics & Session Data

Analytics data (Google Analytics, PostHog) is retained for up to 12 months. Session replay recordings are retained for a maximum of 30 days.

Live Chat & Support Data

Support chat transcripts and tickets are retained for 12 months.

Backup Copies

Backup copies are retained for up to 90 days after primary deletion, then permanently purged.

Requesting Deletion

You may request deletion of your data at any time by emailing support@ilaaj.ai. We will process your request within 30 days.

Data Security

We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

Your Rights

You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. Contact us at any time to exercise these rights.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page.

Contact Us

Email: support@ilaaj.ai

Phone: +92-324-819-9663

Ilaaj AI

Pakistan's first AI-powered health platform. Chat about your symptoms in any language, get AI triage, and receive doctor-verified prescriptions — affordable and accessible, 24/7.

© 2026 Ilaaj AI. All rights reserved.

Ilaaj AI is for general health consultations and non-emergency medical guidance. For emergencies, call 1122 (Rescue) or visit the nearest hospital.
